we observed both long-term resident Timd4-expressing KCs and recently recruited Timd4− monocyte-derived KCs

Although not the case at mRNA level, VSIG4 was found to be the best human KC protein marker in the CITE-seq data, while FOLR2, CD163, and CD169 were also identified as useful markers of these cells for flow cytometry and confocal microscopy on frozen and paraffin sections
